transaction_key.description: A unique transaction key; currently always “deprecated”.

request_id.description: A UUID identifying this specific transcription request.

sha256.description: The SHA-256 hash of the submitted audio file (for pre-recorded requests).

duration.description: Length of the audio in seconds.

channels.description: The top-level results object containing per-channel transcription alternatives.

models.description: List of model UUIDs used for this transcription

name.description: The human-readable name of the model — identifies which model was used.

version.description: The specific version of the model.

arch.description: The architecture of the model — describes the model family / generation.

model_info.description: Mapping from each model UUID (in 'models') to detailed info: its name, version, and architecture.

metadata.description: Metadata about the transcription response, including timing, models, and IDs.

transcript.description: The full transcript text for this alternative.

confidence.description: Overall confidence score (0-1) that assigns to this transcript alternative.

word.description: The raw recognized word, without punctuation or capitalization.

start.description: Start timestamp of the word (in seconds, from beginning of audio).

end.description: End timestamp of the word (in seconds).

confidence.description: Confidence score (0-1) for this individual word.

punctuated_word.description: The same word but with punctuation/capitalization applied (if smart_format is enabled).

words.description: List of word-level timing, confidence, and punctuation details.

transcript.description: The transcript split into paragraphs (with line breaks), when paragraphing is enabled.

text.description: Text of a single sentence in the paragraph.

start.description: Start time of the sentence (in seconds).

end.description: End time of the sentence (in seconds).

sentences.description: List of sentences in this paragraph, with start/end times.

num_words.description: Number of words in this paragraph.

start.description: Start time of the paragraph (in seconds).

end.description: End time of the paragraph (in seconds).

paragraphs.description: Structure describing each paragraph: its timespan, word count, and sentence breakdown.
An array of paragraph objects, present when the paragraphs feature is enabled.

alternatives.description: List of possible transcription hypotheses (“alternatives”) for each channel.

channels.description: The top-level results object containing per-channel transcription alternatives.
